description: Resume a long coding session by reconstructing open loops, active context, and pending work from session receipts.
user_prompt: A session was interrupted after 20 turns. The receipts are stored in runtime/strategy_runs/. Reconstruct the current state: what was being worked on, what files were open, what edits were in progress, and what the next step should be.
workspace_fixture: A session with 20 turns of receipts in runtime/strategy_runs/ covering strategy_benchmark.py, strategy_scoring.py, and strategy_contracts.py edits.
